 M packages/x-date-pickers/src/internals/hooks/useField/useField.utils.ts

content.text:
Implemented the DST meridiem toggle fix.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/x-date-pickers/src/internals/hooks/useField/useField.utils.ts`
- Replaced `adapter.addHours(..., +/-12)` with `adapter.setHours(..., adjustedHour)` when transferring the `meridiem` section value.

Why:
- `addHours` performs elapsed-time arithmetic, which can cross DST boundaries and shift the date/time unexpectedly.
- For AM/PM toggles, we only want to change the wall-clock hour while preserving the intended local time fields.
- Using `setHours` avoids DST offset arithmetic and correctly changes `12:00 PM` to `12:00 AM`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary focused regression test for `2026-03-08T12:00:00` in `America/New_York`.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix with `11:00 PM`.
- Confirmed it passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression test as requested.

Final working tree:
- Only source fix remains:
  - `packages/x-date-pickers/src/internals/hooks/useField/useField.utils.ts`

No commit was created.
